Hey, welcome back and welcome to the module on beliefs, the potentially silent killers of all things related to success. Or conversely, your most important invisible ally in the achievement of success. Interesting, right? I mean, talk about your yin and your yang, right? Beliefs are basically the post-child for this. You see, let me back up for a second and explain about the way the world generally works for success and everything else. We live in a world of duality. There are two sides to every coin. You have up, then you have down. You have above, you'll have beneath. You have start, you'll have stop. You have yes, you have no. Even ones and zeros with digital, you have a one, you have a zero. To get it, there's always two sides to every coin. You see, you have empowering beliefs, which are those beliefs that lead you to massive wealth and success, the good ones, so to speak. Then you have your limiting or disempowering beliefs that lead you to misery and failure and basically feeling alone and disconnected. Those are your lousy beliefs, your limiting beliefs, right? And here's the way it works. It sets you to the beliefs that you have about yourself and more specifically, the beliefs that you have about whether or not you're going to succeed at something before you actually take action. Well, those are going to define whether or not you actually do try something and take action. For example, you could be in a situation where you have all the best tools, the best resources, the absolute best training available to you, and even the opportunity itself is amazing. We should think that, right? If you find yourself not taking action simply because you don't believe, then you'll end up succeeding. See what happens there is that we're all governed by a belief or lack thereof in our own ability to succeed. So you end up cubby-holing yourself when you don't believe it into a far lower level of success and you're truly getting love. See what happens here is your brain actually projects forward when it thinks might happen if you take action. And if your brain decides that there's not a very good likelihood of success, your brain says, you know what? I'm not going to make it here. Then it says, why do it? Why do all the work? Why take the risk? Why spend the money? Why waste my time? So what happens? You end up not taking action, which is why we don't try things that we don't believe and the operative word there is believe we're good at or believe that we'll succeed at. Let me give you a perfect example here. Even if you were 100% confident that you could basically close anyone's closeable and you also believe that you could handle any business situation that was thrown at you. And now I dropped you into a totally weird environment, strange place. You didn't know a single person and there were no obvious business opportunities screaming in your face. Well, even in that flawed situation, I still guarantee that somehow you'd figure out a way to get back on your feet again and make a ton of money simply because you have a core belief that no matter where you're at or what happens to you, what gets thrown at you, you'll end up finding a way to succeed. You get it? In fact, my best friend's dad growing up out of Lipsky, his dad used to say, if you have fluffed your own out of toilet bowl, he'll end up holding a pulmonary license, bottom line. And that's the power of self-belief. For me, no matter where you put me, I'll end up turning lemons into lemon aids and I've proved that obviously many times again and again and again. It all starts with a belief that I have about myself that essentially within my arsenal of tools, I have everything someone could ever need to achieve success in any situation. And that's what I want for you. So that's why in this module, I'm going to make sure that there are no limiting beliefs hidden below the surface that are going to essentially sabotage your success as you go for the brass ring because once those are eliminated, you set yourself up a massive greatness over both the short term and the long term as well. All right? Now, one more point here before we move forward and that is that your prospects sometimes are going to have their own limiting beliefs that tend to stop them from taking action even when doing so would clearly and obviously be in their best interest. Perfect example, this is my own father, right? With that very high action threshold. I mean, I watched him move through life with my mom and lack many, many things they truly needed because their action threshold was so high. There are some beliefs about buying, taking action, moving through life. It was so tough, so high, they didn't have the things they needed. So obviously, once you know what's getting in people like that's way, right? Well, I'll tell you what, you lower their action thresholds by attacking those beliefs and you can help them get the things they truly need life. And by the way, that's what ethical persuasion is all about. All right? So with that, it's now not quiz time. No quiz here. I want you to roll forward here right to the next lesson where we're really starting to get specific about what beliefs are, how they work, and then how you're going to root all of your negative ones out, your limiting ones out and we'll replace them with empowering beliefs and you will literally soar to success. I'll see you there.
